name: Golden Lime Public Company Limited
summary: Golden Lime Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes industrial chemical products in Thailand and internationally. It offers calcium oxide, calcium hydroxide, and other related products for industrial use. The company also sells, assembles, and installs machinery and equipment related to production of lime, including lime kilns, calcium oxide conveyance systems, and fuel burning machinery, as well as provides advisory services to clients on procurement, installation, production, and maintenance of equipment and machinery. Golden Lime Public Company Limited was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Nonthaburi, Thailand. Golden Lime Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of CE Lime (Thailand) Limited.
